extra.reason: Completed Go monolith skeleton with command help, package layout, tests, and build verification.
Completed config loading and process boot plumbing with defaults, JSON config file support, env overrides, validation, CLI startup paths, and tests.
Completed initial Postgres schema migration with core Forge tables, claim-path indexes, Goose-compatible Up/Down sections, tests, and disposable Postgres apply verification.
Completed sqlc configuration, handwritten Phase 1 core queries, generated pgx-backed models/query methods, dependency setup, and compile-time query surface tests.
Implemented TicketService for create, propose, validation, dependency/event recording, and listing defaults with tests.
Implemented transactional claim-next SQL, generated query methods, claim service validation, and claim context bundle hydration with tests.
Implemented heartbeat and checkpoint SQL mutations with event writes, service validation, and focused tests.
Implemented terminal attempt transitions for complete/fail/block/cancel/expire with ticket status updates, event writes, service validation, and tests.
Implemented claim-next idempotency replay/conflict handling, request hashing, and in-statement claim response storage.
Added River-ready maintenance worker for lease expiry and idempotency cleanup, with sqlc queries, River job wrapper, and tests.
Registered Phase 1 Huma REST route surface and OpenAPI generation under /api/v1 with tests covering required paths.
Added live runtime composition over pgx/sqlc/services/jobs plus API and CLI dependency seams for shared runtime use.
Implemented JSON-first CLI commands over the shared runtime for create/propose/claim/list/get/heartbeat/checkpoint/complete/fail/block/cancel with stable JSON output and tests.
Implemented lightweight artifact metadata registration/retrieval, runtime wiring, and forge attach JSON command with tests.
Added Phase 1 correctness regression suite covering duplicate-claim prevention, eligibility filters, expiry/block behavior, terminal transition guards, and claim idempotency persistence.
Added README with Phase 1 setup, migration, runtime command, JSON CLI, day-zero flow, and correctness test documentation.
All 15 Phase 1 execution-core tasks are closed and go test ./... passes.
Added shared agent operation contract package with JSON schemas, tests, REST operation bindings, and docs.
Added durable agent capability registration, lookup/list service, richer schema fields, sqlc queries, runtime wiring, and Codex-style validation tests.
Added low-friction ticket templates, create-from-attempt service flow, validation for agent-created follow-up work, expanded ticket types, and tests.
Added planner decomposition service flow for proposed or claimable child tasks, dependency wiring, parent/root preservation, proof expectations, runtime wiring, and tests.
Added MCP server lifecycle registry, forge mcp runtime boot path, contract-backed tool registration tests, CLI startup test, and lifecycle docs.
Fixed claim priority ordering and matching index, added decomposition cycle validation, documented branch-per-slice workflow, pinned Go to 1.26.3, and verified tests/vet/race/govulncheck.
Implemented MCP runtime tool dispatch for Phase 2 operations, including update-ticket service support, schema alignment, and coverage for happy paths plus validation failures.
Added JSON-first Codex convenience commands for claim, checkpoint, complete with proof artifacts, follow-up ticket creation, and blocked-attempt capture using shared runtime operations.

Added harness integration documentation for Codex, Claude Code, Gemini CLI, OpenCode, and custom agents, linked it from docs, refreshed MCP lifecycle wording, and added CLI coverage for documented Codex convenience commands.
Added Phase 2 REST/CLI/MCP parity coverage, recorded update-ticket REST binding in the shared contract, documented the closeout adapter matrix, and verified go test ./... passes.

Phase 2 Agent Integration is complete: contracts, capabilities, templates, decomposition, MCP runtime tools, Codex convenience commands, harness examples, parity coverage, and closeout docs are implemented and go test ./... passes.

Defined the Phase 3 human-operations UX contract, view order, non-goals, verification expectations, and Beads breakdown in docs/human-operations.md; verified dependency graph has no cycles and go test ./... passes.
Implemented the Bubble Tea queue foundation, wired forge tui through the shared runtime ListTickets path, added deterministic model/CLI coverage, and verified go test ./... plus forge tui --help.

Implemented the TUI ticket detail surface, wired queue selection to load attempts through the shared runtime query path, added deterministic detail/navigation/error tests, and verified go test ./..., go build, and git diff --check.
Implemented TUI attempts/checkpoints/events/artifacts timelines with blocked/terminal state rendering; verified with go test ./..., go build ./cmd/forge, and git diff --check.

Implemented runtime-backed human ticket transitions for ready, reopen, unblock, request review, review approve/reject, and archive; state changes write ticket events and tests cover allowed/rejected transitions. Verified go test ./..., go build ./cmd/forge, and git diff --check.

Implemented service/runtime proposed-work triage operations with UI-ready source attribution, dedicated proposed-ticket query, tests for list/approval/refine/reject flows, and documentation for propose versus enqueue.
Implemented server-rendered ticket list and detail pages, mounted them under forge server, added runtime-backed HTML tests for list/detail/empty/error states, and updated README server docs.

Implemented human web auth: server config requires admin_token, /login issues an opaque HttpOnly session cookie, human web routes redirect unauthenticated browsers, bearer/header token access supports scripted checks, README documents setup, and go test ./... plus go build ./cmd/forge pass.

Implemented minimal human workspace/project admin screens: /workspaces lists and creates workspaces, /workspaces/{id} inspects projects and creates project scopes, server routes stay auth-protected, docs cover setup path, and tests verify routes avoid dashboard/board-management scope creep.

Implemented shareable deep links for ticket, attempt, artifact, and proposed follow-up inspection routes; web pages render copyable route links; TUI queue/detail surfaces print matching links; README documents link semantics; go test ./... and go build ./cmd/forge pass.

Phase 3 Human Operations is complete: TUI queue/detail/timelines, human operations, proposed-work triage, server-rendered web inspection, auth, shareable deep links, and minimal workspace/project admin screens are implemented; all 10 child tasks are closed and go test ./... plus go build ./cmd/forge pass.
Implemented local artifact storage, Codex proof uploads, /artifacts/{id} retrieval, web links, docs, and tests.
Implemented Phase 4 Postgres full-text search slice with /search web surface; verified with focused packages and go test ./...
Implemented attempt metrics ingestion and basic analytics summary/by-model/by-harness across runtime, CLI, REST, and MCP; verified with go test ./...
